name: Haystack Analytics
description: Haystack Analytics — Engineering metrics platform tracking PR cycle time, deployment frequency, and team productivity.

seo.title: Haystack Analytics — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Haystack Analytics: Haystack Analytics — Engineering metrics platform tracking PR cycle time, deployment frequency, and team productivity.

when_to_use: PR cycle time and deployment frequency dashboards
Track engineering productivity trends over time
Compare team DORA metrics across sprints
Identify bottlenecks in code review and merge processes

pros: Clean PR cycle time and deploy frequency dashboards
Pulls from GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Jira
cons: Narrower scope than LinearB or Jellyfish
Less roadmap velocity than funded competitors
review.verdict: Solid lean option for DORA metrics, but larger competitors offer richer insights for enterprise needs.
review.best_for: Small to mid engineering teams wanting DORA dashboards without enterprise pricing.
review.not_for: Large orgs needing portfolio-level forecasting or cost allocation.
